transcript:
Speaker A (Human): I'm coming from Kolkata.
Speaker B (AI): এটা হবে, I come from Kolkata. [This will be, I come from Kolkata.]
Speaker A (Human): Where do you put up?
Speaker B (AI): Where are you staying? হলো correct way জিজ্ঞেস করার। [Where are you staying? is the correct way to ask.]
Speaker A (Human): তোমার সাথে কথা বলে আমার English অনেক improve হয়েছে। ধন্যবাদ। আবার কালকে আসবো। [Speaking with you has improved my English a lot. Thank you. I will come again tomorrow.]
Speaker B (AI): You're welcome. আমাদের 5 million এর বেশি learners আছে এবং আমরা যেকোনো সময় তোমাকে তোমার English skills build করতে help করতে পারি। তাই MySivi Pro জয়েন করো। Install now. [You're welcome. We have more than 5 million learners and we can help you build your English skills at any time. So join MySivi Pro. Install now.]
on_screen_text: I'm coming from Kolkata. Day 1. I come from Kolkata. Where do you put up? Day 7. Where are you staying? correct way jiggesh. Tomar sathe kotha bole amar English. Day 15. You're welcome. MySivi AI English Speaking... Install. 5M+ Downloads. MySivi is now MySivi. Improve English speaking with AI. MySivi Pro. Install Now.
summary: The ad uses a split-screen format to show a woman practicing English with an AI robot over 15 days. The AI corrects her common grammatical errors, demonstrating her progress. It ends with a call to action to download the MySivi app to build English fluency.
